operations.command: cd ${git} && perl build/make-entities.pl && gperf src/treebuilder/element-type.gperf | sed -e 's/^\(const struct element_type_map\)/static \1/' > src/treebuilder/autogenerated-element-type.c

replacements:
error = treebuilder->tree_handler->append_child(
				treebuilder->tree_handler->ctx,
				treebuilder->context.element_stack[
					treebuilder->context.current_node].node,
				node, &appended);

error = treebuilder->tree_handler->append_child(
				treebuilder->tree_handler->ctx,
				treebuilder->context.element_stack[
					treebuilder->context.current_node].node,
						text, &appended);
